original_image_tags: A newspaper clipping pasted onto the center of the page.

elements.description: One newspaper clipping titled 'Boys' Flying Saucer Hoax Stirs Police, FBI and Army' by the Associated Press. The text describes a hoax in Twin Falls, Idaho on July 12, mentioning an object made from parts of an old telephone and burned-out radio tubes. There is no embedded photograph or illustration inside the clipping.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a single newspaper clipping as the primary visual element, but Description B adds specific details (title, date, location, content) not present in Description A, without contradiction on the visual content itself.
